sections.paragraph:
Original: מקנה

Transliteration: miqneh

Phonetic: mik-neh'

BDB Definition:

  1. cattle, livestock
    1. cattle, livestock
      1. in general of a purchasable domestic animal
    2. cows, sheep, goats (in herds and flocks)

Origin: from H7069

TWOT entry: 2039b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
